title: Nvidia Optimized VR
description: A minecraft modlist that's centered to work with the nvidium mod in vr for the best performance possible. Also including as many other mods for immersion.
body: A modlist centered to work with nvidium for the best performance possible in vr. I also included as many possible as i could think of for immersion while adding nothing performance intensive. I included a mod to remove hunger because it sucks and several mods to improve world generation in each area (Terralith, Nullscape, BetterNether). (Make sure to turn off frustrum culling on the better clouds mod under the mods tab on the main menu or you may see clouds pop in and out of view on the edge of your lenses. If this impacts performance for you, turn down the chunk size of the clouds in the mod. Visual difference is indiscernable, at least for me). One more thing is that since this modlist has nvidium, shaders are imcompatable. However with my 2080 super and 14600kf I was able to run this modlist at around 100-120 fps at 60 chunk size, selecting 80 on the nvidium tab in the pause menu as well.
